label: Stage end trigger (pawn on target cell)
description: Ends the stage when the specified role pawn reaches the target cell and waits there for a given number of ticks.

roleId.label: Role ID
roleId.description: ID of the role whose assigned pawn must reach the target cell.

waitTicks.label: Wait ticks
waitTicks.description: Number of ticks the pawn must remain on the target cell before the trigger fires. Defaults to 50.
